subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto him who hath believed and turned towards His straight Path. Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن و اقبل الی صراطه المستقیم اسمع ندائی من شطر سجنی ثم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
